title: kokera blanchetii
intro: Kokera blanchetii, also known as 'Tie Guan Yin', is a type of Camellia sinensis, a plant species that is classified as a variety of the tea plant. The leaves of the kokera blanchetii plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with kokera blanchetii include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of certain cancers, and enhanced antioxidant levels in the body. In herbal preparations, the leaves are typically dried and infused in hot water to make a tea that can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
